_headline_poll.text: Global polling settings (applies to polling drivers like Modbus/HTTP/UDP; event-driven drivers ignore it).

_hint_poll.text: Tip: You can override polling interval and protocol timeouts per device in the Devices tab.

_help0.text: Geräte hinzufügen und konfigurieren. Auswahl erfolgt lokal aus den integrierten Templates (keine laufende Instanz erforderlich).

items.label: Device ID (unique)
items.validator: (() => { try { if (!data.id) return false; if (!globalData || !Array.isArray(globalData.devices)) return true; const id = String(data.id); const cnt = globalData.devices.filter(d => d && String(d.id) === id).length; return cnt <= 1; } catch (e) { return !!data.id; } })()

items.label: Heartbeat timeout (ms)
items.helperText: Used to mark device stale (0 = disabled).

_adv0.text: Legacy settings: devicesJson was used by the old Materialize UI. The adapter will auto-migrate it into the new devices array when possible.
